page_content:
Prerequisite: ECON326 or AREC326.

Credit Only Granted for: AREC430 or AREC489K.

Formerly: AREC489K.

AREC431 Agricultural Water Quality: Policy and Legal Issues (3 Credits) An overview of the American and Maryland legal systems and sources of legal information as it pertains to water quality and agriculture. Prerequisite: AREC326; or ECON326; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

Credit Only Granted for. AREC489L or AREC431.
